app.title: Health AI
app.subtitle: Your Personalized Health
app.description: Monitor, analyze and improve your wellness with artificial intelligence

auth.name: Name
auth.welcomeDesc: Your personal health assistant powered by artificial intelligence

profile.title: My Profile
profile.fastFood: Do you frequently eat junk food? (FAVC)
profile.vegetables: How often do you eat vegetables per meal? (FCVC)

analysis.title: Health Analysis
analysis.healthScoreTooltip: Your overall health score based on all analyzed factors
analysis.scoreTooltip: Score from 0 to 100 reflecting your overall health. Higher = better.
analysis.bmiTooltip: Body Mass Index — ratio between your weight and height
analysis.caloriesTooltip: Total Daily Energy Expenditure — calories your body needs per day
analysis.noAlerts: ✅ You have no critical medical alerts at this time.
analysis.weeklyGoalsDesc: Weekly goals to improve your wellness
analysis.macroSubtitle: Daily proportion of protein, carbs and fats
analysis.emptyTitle: Analyze your health to get started
analysis.emptyDesc: Complete your profile and click "Analyze my Health" to get personalized recommendations

nutrition.title: Nutrition Plan
nutrition.emptyDesc: Run a health analysis first to get your personalized plan
nutrition.caloriesTooltip: Recommended daily calories for your current goal

exercise.title: Exercise Plan
exercise.emptyDesc: Run a health analysis first to get your personalized routine
exercise.cardioTooltip: Cardiovascular activities recommended for your level

predictions.title: Weight Predictions
predictions.noProgress: No progress recorded yet. Add daily entries to see the comparison!
predictions.emptyDesc: Run a health analysis first to generate personalized predictions!
predictions.tooltipWeight: Your current weight at the time of analysis
predictions.tooltip2w: Weight projected to 2 weeks by the predictive model
predictions.tooltip1m: Weight projected to 1 month by the predictive model
predictions.tooltip6m: Weight projected to 6 months by the predictive model

xai.title: Why did the AI make this decision?

reports.title: Reports
reports.healthReportDesc: Complete clinical summary to share with your doctor.
reports.exerciseReportDesc: Routine adapted to your activity level.
reports.noAnalysis: Run a health analysis first to generate your personalized reports

chat.title: Health Assistant
chat.greeting:
Hello! I'm your health assistant. I can help you with:

• Analysis of your current status
• Personalized recommendations
• Explanation of your predictions
• Nutrition and exercise tips

What would you like to know?
chat.voiceNotSupported: Sorry, your browser doesn't support voice recognition.

voice.notSupported: Voice not supported in this browser

explainability.title: Explainability Center
explainability.subtitle: Understand how AI makes decisions about your health
explainability.dataInputDesc: Your personal and health data are processed by the ML model
explainability.mlProcessingDesc: The XGBoost model analyzes patterns in 11 key factors
explainability.clinicalRulesDesc: The system applies medical rules validated by experts
explainability.finalOutputDesc: A personalized prediction is generated with detailed explanation
explainability.noData: Run a health analysis first to see explainability
